lines.english: Lesson 5
lines.chinese: 第5课
lines.raw: Lesson 5 | 第5课

lines.english: Youth
lines.chinese: 青春
lines.raw: Youth | 青春

lines.english: How does the writer like to treat young people?
lines.chinese: 作者喜欢如何对待年轻人？
lines.raw: How does the writer like to treat young people? | 作者喜欢如何对待年轻人？

lines.english: People are always talking about 'the problem of youth'.
lines.chinese: 人们总是在谈论“青年问题”。
lines.raw: People are always talking about 'the problem of youth'. | 人们总是在谈论“青年问题”。

lines.english: If there is one -- which I take leave to doubt
lines.chinese: 假如真有所谓“青年问题”——对此我不敢苟同
lines.raw: If there is one -- which I take leave to doubt | 假如真有所谓“青年问题”——对此我不敢苟同

lines.english: -- then it is older people who create it, not the young themselves.
lines.chinese: ——那么这个问题是由老年人造成的，而不是年轻人本身造成的。
lines.raw: -- then it is older people who create it, not the young themselves. | ——那么这个问题是由老年人造成的，而不是年轻人本身造成的。

lines.english: Let us get down to fundamentals and agree that the young are after all human beings
lines.chinese: 让我们回归基本事实，承认年轻人毕竟也是人
lines.raw: Let us get down to fundamentals and agree that the young are after all human beings | 让我们回归基本事实，承认年轻人毕竟也是人

lines.english: -- people just like their elders.
lines.chinese: ——和他们的长辈一样的人。
lines.raw: -- people just like their elders. | ——和他们的长辈一样的人。

lines.english: There is only one difference between an old man and a young one:
lines.chinese: 老年人和年轻人只有一个区别：
lines.raw: There is only one difference between an old man and a young one: | 老年人和年轻人只有一个区别：

lines.english: the young man has a glorious future before him
lines.chinese: 年轻人面前是光辉灿烂的未来
lines.raw: the young man has a glorious future before him | 年轻人面前是光辉灿烂的未来

lines.english: and the old one has a splendid future behind him: and maybe that is where the rub is.
lines.chinese: 而老年人身后是辉煌的过去：也许症结就在这里。
lines.raw: and the old one has a splendid future behind him: and maybe that is where the rub is. | 而老年人身后是辉煌的过去：也许症结就在这里。

lines.english: When I was a teenager, I felt that I was just young and uncertain --
lines.chinese: 当我还是个少年时，我觉得自己只是年轻和不确定——
lines.raw: When I was a teenager, I felt that I was just young and uncertain -- | 当我还是个少年时，我觉得自己只是年轻和不确定——

lines.english: that I was a new boy in a huge school,
lines.chinese: 我就像一个庞大校园里的新生，
lines.raw: that I was a new boy in a huge school, | 我就像一个庞大校园里的新生，

lines.english: and I would have been very pleased to be regarded as something so interesting as a problem.
lines.chinese: 如果被看作是像“问题”一样有趣的东西，我一定会非常高兴。
lines.raw: and I would have been very pleased to be regarded as something so interesting as a problem. | 如果被看作是像“问题”一样有趣的东西，我一定会非常高兴。

lines.english: For one thing, being a problem gives you a certain identity,
lines.chinese: 首先，成为一个“问题”会给你某种身份感，
lines.raw: For one thing, being a problem gives you a certain identity, | 首先，成为一个“问题”会给你某种身份感，

lines.english: and that is one of the things the young are busily engaged in seeking.
lines.chinese: 而这正是年轻人正在努力寻找的东西之一。
lines.raw: and that is one of the things the young are busily engaged in seeking. | 而这正是年轻人正在努力寻找的东西之一。

lines.english: I find young people exciting.
lines.chinese: 我觉得年轻人令人兴奋。
lines.raw: I find young people exciting. | 我觉得年轻人令人兴奋。

lines.english: They have an air of freedom,
lines.chinese: 他们有一种自由的气息，
lines.raw: They have an air of freedom, | 他们有一种自由的气息，

lines.english: and they have not a dreary commitment to mean ambitions or love of comfort.
lines.chinese: 他们对平庸的野心或安逸享乐没有沉闷的执着。
lines.raw: and they have not a dreary commitment to mean ambitions or love of comfort. | 他们对平庸的野心或安逸享乐没有沉闷的执着。

lines.english: They are not anxious social climbers, and they have no devotion to material things.
lines.chinese: 他们不是焦虑的社会攀爬者，他们对物质也没有任何执着。
lines.raw: They are not anxious social climbers, and they have no devotion to material things. | 他们不是焦虑的社会攀爬者，他们对物质也没有任何执着。

lines.english: All this seems to me to link them with life and the origins of things.
lines.chinese: 这一切在我看来，都把他们与生命和万物本源联系在一起。
lines.raw: All this seems to me to link them with life and the origins of things. | 这一切在我看来，都把他们与生命和万物本源联系在一起。

lines.english: It's as if they were in some sense cosmic beings in violent and lovely contrast with us suburban creatures.
lines.chinese: 仿佛他们在某种意义上是宇宙生灵，与我们这些市郊凡夫俗子形成强烈而可爱的对比。
lines.raw: It's as if they were in some sense cosmic beings in violent and lovely contrast with us suburban creatures. | 仿佛他们在某种意义上是宇宙生灵，与我们这些市郊凡夫俗子形成强烈而可爱的对比。

lines.english: All that is in my mind when I meet a young person.
lines.chinese: 当我遇到一个年轻人时，我心里想的就是这些。
lines.raw: All that is in my mind when I meet a young person. | 当我遇到一个年轻人时，我心里想的就是这些。

lines.english: He may be conceited, ill-mannered, presumptuous or fatuous, but I do not turn for protection to dreary cliches about respect for elders --
lines.chinese: 他可能自负、粗鲁、傲慢或愚蠢，但我不会用那些关于尊重长辈的陈词滥调来为自己辩护——
lines.raw: He may be conceited, ill-mannered, presumptuous or fatuous, but I do not turn for protection to dreary cliches about respect for elders -- | 他可能自负、粗鲁、傲慢或愚蠢，但我不会用那些关于尊重长辈的陈词滥调来为自己辩护——

lines.english: as if mere age were a reason for respect.
lines.chinese: 仿佛仅仅年龄就是值得尊重的理由。
lines.raw: as if mere age were a reason for respect. | 仿佛仅仅年龄就是值得尊重的理由。

lines.english: I accept that we are equals, and I will argue with him, as an equal, if I think he is wrong.
lines.chinese: 我承认我们是平等的，如果我认为他错了，我会以平等的身份与他争辩。
lines.raw: I accept that we are equals, and I will argue with him, as an equal, if I think he is wrong. | 我承认我们是平等的，如果我认为他错了，我会以平等的身份与他争辩。
